commit_scope: Close the fourth-arm gap for the Form-native JIT oracle-learning and supported metal-lane proofs. The fourth flattener now registers same-source function signatures before body lowering, so compiler recipes can call later helpers and mutually recurse; the lowerer, recursive lowerer, CPU/GPU/ML metal-lane aggregate, and oracle-learning choice band all run four-way on fkwu.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel-emit.fk form-stdlib/form-parse.fk form-stdlib/form-flatten.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-flatten-band.fk
bash form/scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh form-lower form-lower-rec jit-metal-lanes jit-oracle-learning
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-targets.fk form-stdlib/form-asm.fk form-stdlib/form-lower.fk form-stdlib/jit-tensor-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/jit-metal-lanes-band.fk
local_validation.summary: form-flatten-band returned 131071. fourth-arm-gate printed PASS-4WAY for form-lower, form-lower-rec, jit-metal-lanes, and jit-oracle-learning. validate.sh for jit-metal-lanes returned 4095 with 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)'. validate.sh for jit-oracle-learning returned 1023 with the same fourth-arm line. The metal-plane audit passed macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF clang oracle receipts plus fkwu four-way native lane proofs.

ci_validation.summary: Pending PR creation and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy in this step; this is a Form/compiler proof update.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; CI/deploy remain pending until push and PR checks.

evidence_refs: bash form/scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh form-lower form-lower-rec jit-metal-lanes jit-oracle-learning -> PASS-4WAY for all four bands
cd form && ./validate.sh ... jit-metal-lanes-band.fk -> 4095 and fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/tests/jit-oracle-learning-band.fk -> 1023 and fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)

scripts/bml_form_jit_metal_planes_audit.sh -> Form-native JIT lane proof holds four-way; oracle learning choice floor holds four-way; clang oracle assembly/object receipts cover every supported metal plane

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Fourth-arm fkwu validation now covers the Form lowerer, recursive lowerer, supported CPU/GPU/ML JIT metal-lane aggregate, and oracle-learning choice band. The metal-plane audit now fails if those proofs fall back to three-kernel-only.
public_endpoints: not-public-endpoint: form native compiler and audit proof surface
test_flows: Form source flattener handles same-source forward references and mutual recursion.
fkwu validates form-lower, form-lower-rec, jit-metal-lanes, and jit-oracle-learning four-way.
clang oracle assembly/object receipts are generated for macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF surfaces.
